message:
refactor(distributed,plan): delegate encoding to pipeline, add rule verification stubs

Encoding simplification (distributed/encoding.rs):
- Remove redundant create_source_symbols and create_repair_symbols
  methods that duplicated pipeline functionality
- Add rebuild_source_bytes helper to reconstruct original data from
  source symbols
- Add PipelineFailure error variant with from_pipeline converter
- StateEncoder now delegates to RFC-grade RaptorQ pipeline

Certificate verification (plan/certificate.rs):
- Add verification stubs for new rewrite rules (JoinAssoc, RaceAssoc,
  JoinCommute, RaceCommute, TimeoutMin)
- These pass structural validation; semantic checks pending

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
